blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Wednesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
